[
Details ](#description)

Q²M Bug&Grime is a strong and very efficient pre-wash product developed specially for the removal of insects, bugs and grime. It dissolves contamination and ensures safe and scratch-free wash afterwards. It is the first choice product after every summer evening ride. Q²M Bug&Grime works fast and effective and is coating-safe at the same time.


### THE ULTIMATE BUG&GRIME REMOVER

Q²M Bug&Grime is a strong, ready-to-use product, that has been developed to dissolve insects, bugs and road grime stains in a fast and safe way. Just a single application and rinsing with an effective pressure washer will remove most of the visible contamination, even old and resistant stains. Despite its strength, Q²M Bug&Grime is safe for all types of paintwork, quartz coatings and most waxes!


### STRONG & READY TO USE

Q²M Bug&Grime can be used as a strong and effective pre-spray during the first steps of a thorough wash. Just leave it on the surface and then rinse it off. At the same time, it’s a fantastic aid during a more intensive cleaning process and will remove old and heavily settled dirt while agitated with a gentle brush.


## Best practice and pro-tips from Yves Heylen

Use Q²M Bug&Grime as the ultimate pre-wash product on heavily contaminated areas. Use only on cold paint, never in direct sunlight or on a warm car. Do not let the product dry.

Consumption: 80-150ml / car
PH LEVEL: 9
COATING SAFE: yes

Delivery Information ](#deliveryinfo)

At Blok 51 we take great pride in the speed of our dispatch and delivery times.  We try our best to dispatch your orders the same day you order where possible.  To ensure the best chance of your item being dispatched the same day we advise getting your order to us before 12pm (noon).  We also offer a selection of shipping options to ensure you get the service you need.

You can even collect your order from the Blok 51 shop if you like.  Just select ‘Collect In Store’ at the shipping options and we’ll contact you as soon as your order is ready.

To get free standard delivery within the UK all you have to do is spend over £75 and you automatically qualify.

All deliveries are tracked meaning you won’t have to worry about your parcel going missing.

The vast majority of our deliveries to the UK and Ireland only take 1-2 days so you don’t have to wait too long to get your hands on all your favourite detailing and valeting products.
